data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for last-touch/first-touch policy fields.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the last-touch/first-touch policy fields, but there is no evidence provided that confirms their existence or functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for these fields, yet no concrete evidence is presented to demonstrate that they are being tracked or recorded. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary data to validate the requirement is missing.
gaps: No evidence of last-touch/first-touch policy fields.
